name: Intermedical Care and Lab Hospital Public Company Limited
summary: Intermedical Care and Lab Hospital Public Company Limited operates a network of private hospitals. Its occupational health services include annual health checkups, health risk assessments, and pre-occupational checkups, as well as health checkup services for foreign workers, out patient department services, vaccination, and first aid and cardiopulmonary resuscitation training services. The company also provides environment monitoring services, such as occupational health and safety monitoring, vent air quality monitoring, general atmospheric monitoring, and water quality monitoring services, as well as monitoring, sample collection, and analysis services according to the environmental impact assessment protocol. Intermedical Care and Lab Hospital Public Company Limited was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Bangkok, Thailand.
